segments.text: [Speaker Notes] Chapter 2, Opener, As a consequence of noncovalent hydrogen-bonding interactions between water molecules, water possesses remarkable physical and chemical properties. How does hydrogen bonding establish water as the ideal solvent for the biochemistry that is critical to life on Earth?
